info.name: Apidog API
info.description:
Apidog provides a public REST API that lets developers programmatically interact with Apidog projects for importing and exporting API specifications. All API URLs begin with the base URL https://api.apidog.com. The API is versioned via the `X-Apidog-Api-Version` request header (current version: `2024-03-28`). Authentication uses a personal API access token passed as a Bearer Token in the `Authorization` header.

Contact Support:
 Name: Apidog

header.description: (Required) The Apidog API version. Required for all requests. Current supported version is `2024-03-28`. Apidog supports previous versions for at least three months after a newer version launches.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Apidog project.

request.description: Import API specification data in OpenAPI 3 or Swagger 2 format into the specified Apidog project. The specification can be provided as a JSON or YAML string, or fetched from a URL. Advanced options control target folder, branch, module, overwrite behavior, and whether unmatched resources are deleted.

item.name: Export Data In OpenAPI Or Swagger Format

header.description: (Required) The Apidog API version. Required for all requests. Current supported version is `2024-03-28`. Apidog supports previous versions for at least three months after a newer version launches.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Apidog project.

request.description: Export the API specification data from the specified Apidog project in OpenAPI 2.0, 3.0, or 3.1 format. Output is delivered as a fully-formed OpenAPI document containing info, paths, components, tags, and servers.

header.description: (Required) The Apidog API version. Required for all requests. Current supported version is `2024-03-28`. Apidog supports previous versions for at least three months after a newer version launches.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
